_comment: 0.8.3 eu7 0.937->0.896 fidelity-regression bisect / root-cause. OFFLINE, $0, no LLM, no GPU, no build, canonical .venv untouched. Pure git/artifact archaeology.
question: Is eu7 0.937->0.896 caused by CLS-pooling/embedding (case B) or a quantization/ANN vector-path issue (case A)?

verdict.within_case_A_leading_hypothesis: measurement-SUT definition change (B-1 vector_stage_only seam vs 0.7.1 search()), not a genuine quantization-fidelity collapse
verdict.confidence: high on A-vs-B; medium on the within-A sub-mechanism

good_0937.sut: engine.search() (pre-fusion vector path at anchor time)

bad_0896.sut: vector_stage_only B-1 seam (bit-KNN K=192 + f32 rerank)

eliminations.evidence: git diff v0.7.2 v0.8.0 -- fathomdb-embedder/src/ is EMPTY (f32 vectors byte-identical). CLS pooling is commit c7afbfde (2026-06-11, AFTER the 0.896 run), default Mean, production unchanged; CandleBgeEmbedder::new() used by eu7 still returns Pooling::Mean.

GA-1-corpus-ab-20260608: 7667-doc corpus byte-identical between both runs (mtime 2026-05-27, same dir, same sha256). 'Expansion' was a stale qmsum checksum + a qaconv/qasper manifest entry that loaded no files.

eliminations.candidate: case A: bit-KNN SQL / K=192 / f32 rerank
eliminations.evidence: d28d2046 self-documents the unfiltered path (filter=None, used by eu7) as byte-identical to 0.7.2; build_vector_phase1_sql(None) reproduces the same ORDER BY distance LIMIT TOP_K_BIT_CANDIDATES / SEARCH_RERANK_LIMIT.

migrate_vector_partition_pack1_to_pack2 copies embedding/embedding_bin verbatim, only re-tags vec0 BIT subtype + adds status column. Comment: 'no re-quantize, so centering survives the upgrade.' Hamming distances unaffected.

residual.leading: B-1 vector_stage_only seam returns vector_results AS FED TO fuse_rrf (an intermediate list) with its own limit/slack/ordering, not necessarily the bit-identical list 0.7.1 search() returned to the caller -> a legitimate SUT-definition delta (~4pp, sigma shift) with no fidelity loss.
residual.secondary: a vector-branch change in the pre-v0.7.2 sub-window (2026-05-31 anchor -> 2026-06-01 v0.7.2 tag, PR-9 embedder-concurrency hardening) was not build-bisected.
residual.blocker: definitive engine 0.7.x-vs-0.8.0 vector-stage A/B requires an embedded eu7 IR-corpus snapshot; NO pre-embedded eu7-corpus DB exists (/tmp DBs are LME/d0b/r2 corpora, not the 7667-doc IR raw corpus); full CPU re-embed forbidden/out of $0 scope.

recommended_slice20_fix_direction: Decouple CLS-pooling from eu7 fidelity: CLS is an eu8/relevance lever, not the fidelity-recovery for 0.937->0.896.

Reset baseline: true current vector-stage fidelity is 0.896 (CI 0.864-0.925), not 0.937; 0.937 is a pre-B-1-seam SUT number, not directly comparable. Judge Slice-20 eu7 against the 0.90 floor measured FRESH on the seam after re-embed (GA-3 CI gate recall_ci_hi>=0.90).
If fresh eu7 < 0.90 after re-embed, the fork is QUANT-path (NOT pooling), EV order: rotation/whitening before sign-quant > raise ANN fan-out K>192 > 2-bit option.
Settle the residual cheaply: when GPU util<5% (sibling releases GPU), one GPU-embedded eu7 snapshot makes the 0.7.x-vs-0.8.0 vector-stage A/B a minutes-long $0 confirmation.
